name: Sales Anomaly Alert
description: Triggers when hourly revenue at a store deviates >3 standard deviations from rolling 4-week average for that hour/day-of-week

dataSource.query: let lookback = 28d; let current_hour = bin(now(), 1h); let day_of_week = dayofweek(now()); RealtimeSales | where Timestamp > ago(lookback) | extend HourOfDay = hourofday(Timestamp), DayOfWeek = dayofweek(Timestamp) | summarize HourlyRevenue = sum(TotalAmount) by StoreId, HourOfDay, DayOfWeek, DayBin = bin(Timestamp, 1d) | summarize AvgRevenue = avg(HourlyRevenue), StdDevRevenue = stdev(HourlyRevenue) by StoreId, HourOfDay, DayOfWeek | join kind=inner ( RealtimeSales | where Timestamp between (current_hour .. current_hour + 1h) | summarize CurrentRevenue = sum(TotalAmount) by StoreId | extend HourOfDay = hourofday(current_hour), DayOfWeek = day_of_week ) on StoreId, HourOfDay, DayOfWeek | extend ZScore = iff(StdDevRevenue > 0, (CurrentRevenue - AvgRevenue) / StdDevRevenue, 0.0) | where abs(ZScore) > 3.0 | project StoreId, CurrentRevenue, AvgRevenue, StdDevRevenue, ZScore, AnomalyType = iff(ZScore > 0, 'spike', 'drop')

actions.subject: ⚠️ Sales Anomaly Detected: Store {{StoreId}} — {{AnomalyType}}

actions.message: 🔍 Sales anomaly at Store {{StoreId}}: {{AnomalyType}} detected. Current=${{CurrentRevenue}}, Expected=${{AvgRevenue}}, Z-Score={{ZScore}}. Investigate immediately.
